title: Arthropteris albopunctata
taxonomy: Arthropteris albopunctata is a species of fern within the family Blechnaceae. Arthropteris albopunctata is native to New Zealand and is often found in shaded, humid areas. The species is classified as a vascular plant due to its ability to transport water and nutrients throughout its body. Arthropteris albopunctata is also classified as a member of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and fern allies. Its classification is further divided into the class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, and family Blechnaceae.
